sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65504" key="megalotra/xhlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰλο-τράχηλος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n65504.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">large-necked</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐριαύχην</ref></xr>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4099.tlg001:142:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">142.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
